scripts.dev:api: portless run --name api.plansman bun run dev:api:direct
scripts.dev:web: portless run --name plansman bun run dev:web:direct
scripts.dev: bun run dev:api & bun run dev:web & wait
scripts.dev:direct: bun run dev:api:direct & bun run dev:web:direct & wait
scripts.test: bun test tests/contracts-core.test.ts tests/cli.test.ts tests/rest-mcp.test.ts tests/resolution-guard.test.ts tests/restatement-guard.test.ts tests/backlog.test.ts tests/ideas.test.ts
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test
